body:
Updating this with some info I just found out: trigonometric functions are super slow on GPUs.

I should say, I couldn't find anything mentioning this issue online. So if you anyone thinks this is a bug of some sort, let me know and I'll open an issue.
title: Updates simulation tips

body:
Regression test on the latitude longitude grid 
- Hydrostatic free surface model
- only tested the explicit free surface 
- both periodic and bounded latitude topology tested

Comments
- at the moment the data is generated on the fly at tests/test_regression.jl on the CPU() and tested on the GPU()
- explore the option to load the data in OceananigansArtifacts.jl

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: Regression test for Hydrostatic free surface model
